entries.source: We may amend Terms at any time by posting the amended terms on this site. It is your responsibility to review these Terms periodically. Your continued use of the Platform following the posting of revised Terms means that you accept and agree to the changes. You are expected to check this page frequently so you are aware of any changes, as they are binding on you. By continuing to access or use our Service after any revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms. If you do not agree to the new terms, you are no longer authorized to use Service.
entries.value: Féadfaimid Terms a leasú am ar bith trí na téarmaí leasaithe a phostáil ar an suíomh seo. Is ortsa atá an fhreagracht na Terms seo a athbhreithniú go tréimhsiúil. Ciallaíonn d’úsáid leanúnach den Platform tar éis Terms athbhreithnithe a phostáil go nglacann tú leis na hathruithe agus go n-aontaíonn tú leo. Táthar ag súil go seiceálfaidh tú an leathanach seo go minic ionas go mbeidh tú ar an eolas faoi aon athruithe, mar tá siad ceangailteach ort. Trí leanúint de rochtain a fháil ar ár Service nó é a úsáid tar éis d’aon athbhreithnithe teacht i bhfeidhm, aontaíonn tú a bheith faoi cheangal ag na téarmaí athbhreithnithe. Mura n-aontaíonn tú leis na téarmaí nua, níl cead agat Service a úsáid a thuilleadh.

entries.source: We may disclose personal information that we collect, or you provide: Disclosure for Law Enforcement: Under certain circumstances, we may be required to disclose your Data if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities. Business Transaction: If our subsidiaries or we are involved in a merger, acquisition or asset sale, your Personal Data may be transferred. Other cases. We may disclose your information also: to our subsidiaries and affiliates; to contractors, service providers, and other third parties we use to support our business; to fulfil the purpose for which you provide it; to include your company’s logo on our website; for any other purpose disclosed by us when you provide the information; with your consent in any other cases; if we believe disclosure is necessary or appropriate to protect the rights, property, or safety of the Company, our customers, or others.
entries.value: Féadfaimid faisnéis phearsanta a bhailímid, nó a sholáthraíonn tú, a nochtadh: Nochtadh le haghaidh Forfheidhmiú Dlí: Faoi chúinsí áirithe, d’fhéadfadh sé go mbeadh orainn do Data a nochtadh má éilítear sin de réir dlí nó mar fhreagra ar iarratais bhailí ó údaráis phoiblí. Idirbheart Gnó: Má bhíonn ár bhfochuideachtaí nó sinne páirteach i gcumasc, éadáil nó díol sócmhainní, féadfar do Personal Data a aistriú. Cásanna eile. Féadfaimid d’fhaisnéis a nochtadh freisin: dár bhfochuideachtaí agus cleamhnaithe; do chonraitheoirí, soláthraithe seirbhíse, agus tríú páirtithe eile a úsáidimid chun tacú lenár ngnó; chun an cuspóir ar sholáthair tú í dó a chomhlíonadh; chun lógó do chuideachta a chur san áireamh ar ár suíomh gréasáin; chun aon chríche eile a nochtann muid nuair a sholáthraíonn tú an fhaisnéis; le do thoiliú in aon chásanna eile; má chreidimid go bhfuil nochtadh riachtanach nó cuí chun cearta, maoin, nó sábháilteacht Company, ár gcustaiméirí, nó daoine eile a chosaint.

entries.source: We may employ third party companies and individuals to facilitate our Service (“Service Providers”), provide Service on our behalf, perform Service-related services or assist us in analysing how our Service is used. These third parties have access to your Personal Data only to perform these tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.
entries.value: Féadfaimid cuideachtaí agus daoine aonair tríú páirtí a fhostú chun ár Service a éascú (“Service Providers”), Service a sholáthar thar ár gceann, seirbhísí a bhaineann le Service a dhéanamh, nó cabhrú linn anailís a dhéanamh ar an gcaoi a n-úsáidtear ár Service. Níl rochtain ag na tríú páirtithe seo ar do Personal Data ach amháin chun na tascanna seo a dhéanamh thar ár gceann agus tá oibleagáid orthu gan í a nochtadh ná a úsáid chun aon chríche eile.

entries.source: We may provide paid products and/or services within Service. In that case, we use third-party services for payment processing (e.g. payment processors). We will not store or collect your payment card details. That information is provided directly to our third-party payment processors whose use of your personal information is governed by their Privacy Policy. These payment processors adhere to the standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by the PCI Security Standards Council, which is a joint effort of brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover. PCI-DSS requirements help ensure the secure handling of payment information.
entries.value: Féadfaimid táirgí agus/nó seirbhísí íoctha a sholáthar laistigh de Service. Sa chás sin, úsáidimid seirbhísí tríú páirtí le haghaidh próiseáil íocaíochta (m.sh. próiseálaithe íocaíochta). Ní stórálfaimid ná ní bhaileoimid sonraí do chárta íocaíochta. Soláthraítear an fhaisnéis sin go díreach dár bpróiseálaithe íocaíochta tríú páirtí, agus rialaíonn a bPolasaí Príobháideachais féin a n-úsáid de d’fhaisnéis phearsanta. Cloíonn na próiseálaithe íocaíochta seo leis na caighdeáin a leagann PCI-DSS amach mar atá á mbainistiú ag PCI Security Standards Council, comh-iarracht ó bhrandaí amhail Visa, Mastercard, American Express agus Discover. Cabhraíonn riachtanais PCI-DSS le láimhseáil shlán faisnéise íocaíochta a chinntiú.

entries.source: We may terminate or suspend your account and bar access to Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, under our sole discretion, for any reason whatsoever and without limitation, including but not limited to a breach of Terms. If you wish to terminate your account, you may simply discontinue using Service. All provisions of Terms which by their nature should survive termination shall survive termination, including, without limitation, ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity and limitations of liability.
entries.value: Féadfaimid do chuntas a fhoirceannadh nó a chur ar fionraí agus rochtain ar Service a chosc láithreach, gan fógra roimh ré ná dliteanas, dár lánrogha féin, ar chúis ar bith agus gan teorainn, lena n-áirítear ach gan a bheith teoranta do shárú Terms. Más mian leat do chuntas a fhoirceannadh, is féidir leat stopadh go simplí de Service a úsáid. Mairfidh gach foráil de Terms ar cheart di, de réir a nádúir, maireachtáil tar éis foirceanta, lena n-áirítear, gan teorainn, forálacha úinéireachta, séantaí baránta, slánaíocht agus teorainneacha dliteanais.

entries.source: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. We will let you know via email and/or a prominent notice on our Service, prior to the change becoming effective and update “effective date” at the top of this Privacy Policy. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.
entries.value: Féadfaimid ár bPolasaí Príobháideachais a nuashonrú ó am go ham. Cuirfimid aon athruithe in iúl duit tríd an bPolasaí Príobháideachais nua a phostáil ar an leathanach seo. Cuirfimid ar an eolas thú trí ríomhphost agus/nó fógra feiceálach ar ár Service, sula dtiocfaidh an t-athrú i bhfeidhm, agus nuashonróimid an “effective date” ag barr an Pholasaí Príobháideachais seo. Moltar duit an Polasaí Príobháideachais seo a athbhreithniú go tréimhsiúil le haghaidh aon athruithe. Tagann athruithe ar an bPolasaí Príobháideachais seo i bhfeidhm nuair a phostáiltear iad ar an leathanach seo.

entries.source: We may use remarketing services to advertise on third party websites to you after you visited our Service. We and our third-party vendors use cookies to inform, optimise and serve ads based on your past visits to our Service.
entries.value: Féadfaimid seirbhísí athmhargaíochta a úsáid chun fógraíocht a thaispeáint duit ar shuíomhanna gréasáin tríú páirtí tar éis duit cuairt a thabhairt ar ár Service. Úsáideann muidne agus ár ndíoltóirí tríú páirtí cookies chun fógraí a chur ar an eolas, a bharrfheabhsú agus a sheirbheáil bunaithe ar do chuairteanna roimhe seo ar ár Service.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to automate the development process of our Service.
entries.value: Féadfaimid Service Providers tríú páirtí a úsáid chun próiseas forbartha ár Service a uathoibriú.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to monitor and analyze the use of our Service.
entries.value: Féadfaimid Service Providers tríú páirtí a úsáid chun faireachán agus anailís a dhéanamh ar úsáid ár Service.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to show advertisements to you to help support and maintain our Service.
entries.value: Féadfaimid Service Providers tríú páirtí a úsáid chun fógraí a thaispeáint duit chun cabhrú lenár Service a thacú agus a chothabháil.

entries.source: We reserve the right to withdraw or amend our Service, and any service or material we provide via Service, in our sole discretion without notice. We will not be liable if for any reason all or any part of Service is unavailable at any time or for any period. From time to time, we may restrict access to some parts of Service, or the entire Service, to users, including registered users.
entries.value: Coimeádaimid an ceart ár Service, agus aon seirbhís nó ábhar a sholáthraímid trí Service, a tharraingt siar nó a leasú dár lánrogha féin gan fógra. Ní bheidh muid faoi dhliteanas má bhíonn Service ar fad nó aon chuid de Service ar fáil ag am ar bith nó ar feadh tréimhse ar bith ar chúis ar bith. Ó am go ham, féadfaimid rochtain ar chodanna áirithe de Service, nó ar an Service iomlán, a shrianadh d’úsáideoirí, lena n-áirítear úsáideoirí cláraithe.

entries.source: We respect the intellectual property rights of others. It is our policy to respond to any claim that Content posted on Service infringes on the copyright or other intellectual property rights (“Infringement”) of any person or entity. If you are a copyright owner, or authorized on behalf of one, and you believe that the copyrighted work has been copied in a way that constitutes copyright infringement, please submit your claim via email to support@inspir.app, with the subject line: “Copyright Infringement” and include in your claim a detailed description of the alleged Infringement as detailed below, under “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims” You may be held accountable for damages (including costs and attorneys’ fees) for misrepresentation or bad-faith claims on the infringement of any Content found on and/or through Service on your copyright.
entries.value: Tá meas againn ar chearta maoine intleachtúla daoine eile. Is é ár bpolasaí freagra a thabhairt ar aon éileamh go sáraíonn Content a phostáiltear ar Service cóipcheart nó cearta maoine intleachtúla eile (“Infringement”) aon duine nó eintitis. Más úinéir cóipchirt thú, nó má tá tú údaraithe thar ceann úinéara, agus má chreideann tú gur cóipeáladh an saothar faoi chóipcheart ar bhealach a dhéanann sárú cóipchirt, cuir d’éileamh isteach trí ríomhphost chuig support@inspir.app, leis an líne ábhair: “Copyright Infringement” agus cuir san áireamh i d’éileamh cur síos mionsonraithe ar an Infringement líomhnaithe mar atá sonraithe thíos, faoi “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims”. D’fhéadfaí tú a choinneáil freagrach as damáistí (lena n-áirítear costais agus táillí aturnaetha) as mífhaisnéis nó éilimh droch-chreidimh maidir le sárú aon Content a fhaightear ar Service agus/nó trí Service ar do chóipcheart.

entries.source: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our Service and we hold certain information. Cookies are files with a small amount of data which may include an anonymous unique identifier. Cookies are sent to your browser from a website and stored on your device. Other tracking technologies are also used such as beacons, tags and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze our Service. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service. Examples of Cookies we use:Session Cookies: We use Session Cookies to operate our Service. Preference Cookies: We use Preference Cookies to remember your preferences and various settings. Security Cookies: We use Security Cookies for security purposes. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies are used to serve you with advertisements that may be relevant to you and your interests.
entries.value: Úsáidimid cookies agus teicneolaíochtaí rianaithe comhchosúla chun an ghníomhaíocht ar ár Service a rianú agus coinnímid faisnéis áirithe. Is comhaid iad Cookies a bhfuil méid beag sonraí iontu agus d’fhéadfadh aitheantóir uathúil anaithnid a bheith san áireamh iontu. Seoltar Cookies chuig do bhrabhsálaí ó shuíomh gréasáin agus stóráiltear iad ar do ghléas. Úsáidtear teicneolaíochtaí rianaithe eile freisin amhail beacons, tags agus scripts chun faisnéis a bhailiú agus a rianú agus chun ár Service a fheabhsú agus a anailísiú. Is féidir leat treoir a thabhairt do do bhrabhsálaí gach cookie a dhiúltú nó a chur in iúl nuair atá cookie á sheoladh. Mar sin féin, mura nglacann tú le cookies, seans nach mbeidh tú in ann codanna áirithe dár Service a úsáid. Samplaí de Cookies a úsáidimid: Session Cookies: Úsáidimid Session Cookies chun ár Service a oibriú. Preference Cookies: Úsáidimid Preference Cookies chun do roghanna agus socruithe éagsúla a mheabhrú. Security Cookies: Úsáidimid Security Cookies chun críocha slándála. Advertising Cookies: Úsáidtear Advertising Cookies chun fógraí a sheirbheáil duit a d’fhéadfadh a bheith ábhartha duit agus do do leasanna.

entries.source: We went outside our planet. However, the most rapid and significant advancement was in communication and technology which has connected a global population of over 3 billion people.
entries.value: Chuaigh muid amach lasmuigh dár bpláinéad. Mar sin féin, ba é an dul chun cinn ba thapúla agus ba shuntasaí ná sa chumarsáid agus sa teicneolaíocht, a cheangail daonra domhanda os cionn 3 billiún duine.

entries.source: We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. We will retain and use your Personal Data to the extent necessary to comply with our legal obligations (for example, if we are required to retain your data to comply with applicable laws), resolve disputes, and enforce our legal agreements and policies. We will also retain Usage Data for internal analysis purposes. Usage Data is generally retained for a shorter period, except when this data is used to strengthen the security or to improve the functionality of our Service, or we are legally obligated to retain this data for longer time periods.
entries.value: Coinneoimid do Personal Data ach chomh fada agus is gá do na cuspóirí atá leagtha amach sa Pholasaí Príobháideachais seo. Coinneoimid agus úsáidfimid do Personal Data a mhéid is gá chun cloí lenár n-oibleagáidí dlíthiúla (mar shampla, má cheanglaítear orainn do shonraí a choinneáil chun cloí le dlíthe infheidhme), díospóidí a réiteach, agus ár gcomhaontuithe agus polasaithe dlíthiúla a fhorfheidhmiú. Coinneoimid Usage Data freisin chun críocha anailíse inmheánaí. Coinnítear Usage Data de ghnáth ar feadh tréimhse níos giorra, ach amháin nuair a úsáidtear na sonraí seo chun slándáil a neartú nó feidhmiúlacht ár Service a fheabhsú, nó nuair atá oibleagáid dhlíthiúil orainn na sonraí seo a choinneáil ar feadh tréimhsí níos faide.

entries.source: Welcome to Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) (“Company”, “we”, “our”, “us”)! These Terms of Service (“Terms”, “Terms of Service”) govern your use of our website located atwww.inspir.appand applications available on app stores (together or individually “Service”) operated by Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). Our Privacy Policy also governs your use of our Service and explains how we collect, safeguard and disclose information that results from your use of our web pages. The privacy policy is available at inspir.app/privacy Your agreement with us includes these Terms and our Privacy Policy (“Agreements”). You acknowledge that you have read and understood the Agreements, and agree to be bound of them. If you do not agree with (or cannot comply with) Agreements, then you may not use the Service, but please let us know by emailing support@inspir.appso we can try to find a solution. These Terms apply to all visitors, users and others who wish to access or use the Service.
entries.value: Fáilte chuig Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) (“Company”, “we”, “our”, “us”)! Rialaíonn na Terms of Service seo (“Terms”, “Terms of Service”) d’úsáid ar ár suíomh gréasáin atá suite agwww.inspir.appagus ar iarratais atá ar fáil ar app stores (le chéile nó ina n-aonar “Service”) atá á n-oibriú ag Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). Rialaíonn ár bPolasaí Príobháideachais d’úsáid ar ár Service freisin agus míníonn sé conas a bhailímid, a chosnaímid agus a nochtann muid faisnéis a eascraíonn as d’úsáid dár leathanaigh ghréasáin. Tá an polasaí príobháideachais ar fáil ag inspir.app/privacy. Cuimsíonn do chomhaontú linn na Terms seo agus ár bPolasaí Príobháideachais (“Agreements”). Aithníonn tú gur léigh agus gur thuig tú na Agreements, agus aontaíonn tú a bheith faoi cheangal acu. Mura n-aontaíonn tú le Agreements (nó mura féidir leat cloí leo), ní fhéadfaidh tú an Service a úsáid, ach cuir in iúl dúinn trí ríomhphost chuig support@inspir.appso ionas gur féidir linn iarracht a dhéanamh réiteach a aimsiú. Baineann na Terms seo le gach cuairteoir, úsáideoir agus duine eile ar mian leo rochtain a fháil ar an Service nó é a úsáid.

entries.source: When you create an account with us, you guarantee that the information you provide us is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Inaccurate, incomplete, or obsolete information may result in the immediate termination of your account on Service. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password, including but not limited to the restriction of access to your computer and/or account. You agree to accept responsibility for any and all activities or actions that occur under your account and/or password, whether your password is with our Service or a third-party service. You must notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any breach of security or unauthorized use of your account. You may not use as a username the name of another person or entity or that is not lawfully available for use, a name or trademark that is subject to any rights of another person or entity other than you, without appropriate authorization. You may not use as a username any name that is offensive, vulgar or obscene. We reserve the right to refuse service, terminate accounts, remove or edit content, or cancel orders in our sole discretion.
entries.value: Nuair a chruthaíonn tú cuntas linn, ráthaíonn tú go bhfuil an fhaisnéis a sholáthraíonn tú dúinn cruinn, iomlán agus cothrom le dáta i gcónaí. D’fhéadfadh faisnéis mhíchruinn, neamhiomlán, nó as dáta a bheith mar thoradh ar fhoirceannadh láithreach do chuntais ar Service. Tá tú freagrach as rúndacht do chuntais agus do phasfhocail a chothabháil, lena n-áirítear ach gan a bheith teoranta do rochtain ar do ríomhaire agus/nó cuntas a shrianadh. Aontaíonn tú freagracht a ghlacadh as gach gníomhaíocht nó gníomh a tharlaíonn faoi do chuntas agus/nó pasfhocal, cibé acu atá do phasfhocal lenár Service nó le seirbhís tríú páirtí. Ní mór duit fógra a thabhairt dúinn láithreach nuair a thagann tú ar an eolas faoi aon sárú slándála nó úsáid neamhúdaraithe de do chuntas. Ní fhéadfaidh tú ainm duine nó eintitis eile a úsáid mar ainm úsáideora, ná ainm nach bhfuil ar fáil go dleathach lena úsáid, ná ainm nó trádmharc atá faoi réir cearta duine nó eintitis eile seachas tusa, gan údarú cuí. Ní fhéadfaidh tú aon ainm maslach, graosta nó mígheanmnaí a úsáid mar ainm úsáideora. Coimeádaimid an ceart seirbhís a dhiúltú, cuntais a fhoirceannadh, ábhar a bhaint nó a chur in eagar, nó orduithe a chealú dár lánrogha féin.

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: Nuair a ghreamaíonn tú nótaí isteach in IS, iarr air smaointe leathana a roinnt sna poist sin. Is fearr de ghnáth deic le 18 gcárta shonracha ná deic le 5 chárta ollmhóra a bhfuil alt iomlán i ngach ceann acu.

entries.source: While using our Service, we may also collect the following information: sex, age, date of birth, place of birth, passport details, citizenship, registration at place of residence and actual address, telephone number (work, mobile), details of documents on education, qualification, professional training, employment agreements, information on bonuses and compensation, information on marital status, family members, social security (or other taxpayer identification) number, office location and other data. Payment Data. We may collect data necessary to process your payment if you make purchases, such as your payment instrument number (such as a credit card number), and the security code associated with your payment instrument. All payment data is stored by Razorpay. You may find their privacy notice link(s) here: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy
entries.value: Agus ár Service á úsáid agat, féadfaimid an fhaisnéis seo a leanas a bhailiú freisin: gnéas, aois, dáta breithe, áit bhreithe, sonraí pas, saoránacht, clárú ag áit chónaithe agus seoladh iarbhír, uimhir theileafóin (obair, fón póca), sonraí doiciméad ar oideachas, cáilíocht, oiliúint ghairmiúil, comhaontuithe fostaíochta, faisnéis faoi bhónais agus cúiteamh, faisnéis faoi stádas pósta, baill teaghlaigh, uimhir slándála sóisialta (nó aitheantas cánachíocóra eile), suíomh oifige agus sonraí eile. Payment Data. Féadfaimid sonraí a bhailiú atá riachtanach chun d’íocaíocht a phróiseáil má dhéanann tú ceannacháin, amhail uimhir d’uirlis íocaíochta (mar shampla uimhir chárta creidmheasa), agus an cód slándála a bhaineann le d’uirlis íocaíochta. Stórálann Razorpay na sonraí íocaíochta go léir. Is féidir leat nasc nó naisc a bhfógra príobháideachais a fháil anseo: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy

entries.source: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you (“Personal Data”). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to: Email address of Student and Parent First name and last name of Student and Parent Phone number of Student and Parent Address, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City School name Class Cookies and Usage Data We may use your Data to contact you with newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information that may interest you. You may opt-out of receiving any, or all, of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link. Usage Data, We may also collect information that your browser sends whenever you visit our Service or when you access Service by or through any device (“Usage Data”). This Usage Data may include information such as your computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data. When you access Service with a device, this Usage Data may include information such as the type of device you use, your device unique ID, the IP address of your device, your device operating system, the type of Internet browser you use, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.
entries.value: Agus ár Service á úsáid agat, d’fhéadfaimis iarraidh ort faisnéis áirithe inaitheanta phearsanta a sholáthar dúinn is féidir a úsáid chun teagmháil a dhéanamh leat nó chun tú a aithint (“Personal Data”). D’fhéadfadh faisnéis inaitheanta phearsanta a bheith san áireamh, ach níl sí teoranta do: Seoladh ríomhphoist an Dalta agus an Tuismitheora Céadainm agus sloinne an Dalta agus an Tuismitheora Uimhir theileafóin an Dalta agus an Tuismitheora Seoladh, Tír, Stát, Cúige, ZIP/Cód poist, Cathair Ainm scoile Rang Cookies agus Usage Data. Féadfaimid do Data a úsáid chun teagmháil a dhéanamh leat le nuachtlitreacha, ábhair mhargaíochta nó chur chun cinn agus faisnéis eile a d’fhéadfadh suim a bheith agat inti. Is féidir leat diúltú d’aon cheann, nó do gach ceann, de na cumarsáidí seo uainn tríd an nasc díliostála a leanúint. Usage Data, Féadfaimid faisnéis a bhailiú freisin a sheolann do bhrabhsálaí gach uair a thugann tú cuairt ar ár Service nó nuair a fhaigheann tú rochtain ar Service trí aon ghléas (“Usage Data”). D’fhéadfadh faisnéis amhail seoladh Internet Protocol do ríomhaire (m.sh. seoladh IP), cineál brabhsálaí, leagan brabhsálaí, leathanaigh ár Service a dtugann tú cuairt orthu, am agus dáta do chuairte, an t-am a chaitear ar na leathanaigh sin, aitheantóirí uathúla gléis agus sonraí diagnóiseacha eile a bheith san Usage Data seo. Nuair a fhaigheann tú rochtain ar Service le gléas, d’fhéadfadh faisnéis amhail an cineál gléis a úsáideann tú, ID uathúil do ghléis, seoladh IP do ghléis, córas oibriúcháin do ghléis, cineál an bhrabhsálaí Idirlín a úsáideann tú, aitheantóirí uathúla gléis agus sonraí diagnóiseacha eile a bheith san Usage Data seo.

entries.source: World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: Bhí Stair an Domhain ag gach pointe ama cosúil le súmáil amach as pictiúr, pictiúr a bhí ag athrú i gcónaí. Ba chasadh i stair an duine iad na céadta bliain roimh an 19ú haois, de réir mar a bhog an domhan ó dhearcadh cothrom teoranta ar an domhan go tuiscint mhéadaitheach ar chríocha agus coilíneachtaí nua. Ba í Réabhlóid na Fraince an chéad uair a chruinnigh daonra mór chun agóid a dhéanamh agus idéil na saoirse, an chomhionannais, agus na bráithreachais a bhunú. Mhúnlaigh imeachtaí an Dara Cogadh Domhanda an domhan don chéad chéad bliain eile freisin agus leag siad bunús don 21ú haois.

entries.source: Worldwide
entries.value: Ar fud an domhain

entries.source: Write a check-in script
entries.value: Scríobh script seiceála isteach

entries.source: Write a good forum question
entries.value: Scríobh ceist mhaith don fhóram

entries.source: Write a three-sentence explanation without looking, then ask the Socratic mode to find the weak link.
entries.value: Scríobh míniú trí abairt gan féachaint, ansin iarr ar an mód Sócraiteach an nasc lag a aimsiú.

entries.source: Write and communicate clearly
entries.value: Scríobh agus cumarsáidigh go soiléir

entries.source: Write down the principle learned before expanding the project.
entries.value: Scríobh síos an prionsabal a foghlaimíodh sula leathnaíonn tú an tionscadal.

entries.source: Write exactly where you got stuck before asking for help.
entries.value: Scríobh go díreach cá ndeachaigh tú i sáinn sula n-iarrann tú cabhair.

entries.source: Write my weekly study report
entries.value: Scríobh mo thuairisc staidéir sheachtainiúil

entries.source: Write one sentence that says what you want to understand, remember, decide, or produce after reading this guide.
entries.value: Scríobh abairt amháin a deir cad ba mhaith leat a thuiscint, a mheabhrú, a chinneadh, nó a tháirgeadh tar éis duit an treoir seo a léamh.

entries.source: Write the lesson learned before expanding the project.
entries.value: Scríobh an ceacht a foghlaimíodh sula leathnaíonn tú an tionscadal.

entries.source: Write the strongest claim and strongest counterclaim.
entries.value: Scríobh an t-éileamh is láidre agus an frithéileamh is láidre.

entries.source: Write what the assignment asks and what you tried.
entries.value: Scríobh cad a iarrann an tasc agus cad a thriail tú.

entries.source: Write your next step.
entries.value: Scríobh do chéad chéim eile.

entries.source: Writing, language, presentations, public speaking, and note-making modes for clearer expression.
entries.value: Modhanna scríbhneoireachta, teanga, cur i láthair, cainte poiblí, agus nótaí a dhéanamh le haghaidh léiriú níos soiléire.

entries.source: XP & Leveling
entries.value: XP agus Leibhéalú

entries.source: xTracking Cookies Data
entries.value: Sonraí xTracking Cookies

entries.source: Yes, but the recommended workflow is hint-first. Use it to understand the method, check your work, and review errors instead of copying a final answer.
entries.value: Sea, ach is é an sreabhadh oibre molta leid ar dtús. Úsáid é chun an modh a thuiscint, do chuid oibre a sheiceáil, agus earráidí a athbhreithniú in ionad freagra deiridh a chóipeáil.

entries.source: Yes, when it gives hints, checks reasoning, explains mistakes, and asks you to produce the final answer instead of writing it for you.
entries.value: Is ea, nuair a thugann sé leideanna, a sheiceálann sé réasúnaíocht, a mhíníonn sé botúin, agus a iarrann sé ort an freagra deiridh a tháirgeadh in ionad é a scríobh duit.

entries.source: Yes. {value1} opens as a public guest learning mode at {value2}, so you can start with a few free guest messages before creating an account.
entries.value: Sea. Osclaíonn {value1} mar mhód poiblí foghlama aoi ag {value2}, ionas gur féidir leat tosú le cúpla teachtaireacht aoi saor in aisce sula gcruthaíonn tú cuntas.

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Sea. Is sreabhadh oibre maith é an bunús a fhoghlaim ó fhoinse cheachta iontaofa, ansin inspir a úsáid chun ceisteanna leantacha a chur, cuimhne a chleachtadh, míthuiscintí a dheisiú, agus an chéad rud eile le hathbhreithniú a phleanáil.

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: Sea. Is féidir le scoil tosú trí mhodhanna poiblí a thástáil, ansin bogadh i dtreo píolóta nó imscaradh saincheaptha nuair atá an cás úsáide, riachtanais ábhair, agus cosán maoinithe soiléir.

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: Sea. Ní nascann leathanaigh lucht féachana ach le modhanna poiblí aoi, treoracha, tosaitheoirí prasa, cosáin foghlama, agus comhaid fionnachtana inléite ag IS. Fanann comhráite sábháilte príobháideacha eisiata.

entries.source: Yes. Category pages link into public guest modes, learning paths, and article clusters so learners can move from reading into tutoring, quizzes, flashcards, debate, planning, or feedback.
entries.value: Sea. Nascann leathanaigh chatagóire le modhanna poiblí aoi, cosáin foghlama, agus cnuasaigh alt ionas gur féidir le foghlaimeoirí bogadh ó léamh go teagasc, tráthanna ceist, spléachchártaí, díospóireacht, pleanáil, nó aiseolas.

entries.source: Yes. Code Tutor can explain concepts, walk through examples, ask you to predict behavior, and help you practice without turning learning into copy-paste.
entries.value: Sea. Is féidir le Code Tutor coincheapa a mhíniú, samplaí a shiúl tríd, iarraidh ort iompar a thuar, agus cabhrú leat cleachtadh gan an fhoghlaim a iompú ina chóipeáil agus greamú.

entries.source: Yes. Exam Prep Planner can turn your topics, date, and available time into a practical revision sequence with practice and review.
entries.value: Sea. Is féidir le Exam Prep Planner do thopaicí, dáta, agus am atá ar fáil a iompú ina sheicheamh praiticiúil athbhreithnithe le cleachtadh agus athbhreithniú.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: Sea. Ligeann modhanna poiblí aoi do mhúinteoirí iompar foghlama a thástáil sula bpléitear imscaradh saincheaptha.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: Sea. Osclaíonn modhanna poiblí aoi amhail Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, tráthanna ceist, spléachchártaí, agus aiseolas scríbhneoireachta go díreach.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: Sea. Osclaíonn modhanna poiblí aoi amhail Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, tráthanna ceist, agus spléachchártaí go díreach ó URLanna canónacha /chat/{topicSlug}.

entries.source: Yes. Public mode URLs open directly in guest mode so a learner can start immediately, then create an account later if they want saved history or more usage.
entries.value: Sea. Osclaíonn URLanna mód poiblí go díreach i mód aoi ionas gur féidir le foghlaimeoir tosú láithreach, ansin cuntas a chruthú níos déanaí má theastaíonn stair shábháilte nó tuilleadh úsáide uaidh.

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: Sea. Oibríonn modhanna poiblí do thopaicí scoile, scileanna gairmiúla, códú, taighde, tionscadail, agus gnáthaimh staidéir phearsanta.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic chats such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly in guest mode.
entries.value: Is ea. Osclaíonn comhráite topaice poiblí amhail Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, tráth na gceist, agus luaschártaí go díreach i mód aoi.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: Sea. Tá pointí iontrála topaicí poiblí amhail /chat/learn-anything agus /chat/socratic-instruction beartaithe mar leathanaigh foghlama in-innéacsaithe.

entries.source: Yes. Quiz, Flashcard Builder, and Spaced Review are public modes designed for active recall and mistake repair.
entries.value: Sea. Is modhanna poiblí iad Quiz, Flashcard Builder, agus Spaced Review atá deartha don chuimhne ghníomhach agus do dheisiú botún.

entries.source: Yes. Reading Companion can simplify passages, ask questions, explain vocabulary, and help you identify the main claim and supporting evidence.
entries.value: Sea. Is féidir le Reading Companion sleachta a shimpliú, ceisteanna a chur, stór focal a mhíniú, agus cabhrú leat an príomhéileamh agus an fhianaise tacaíochta a aithint.
